mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate over the trailing 3 months lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically raising present-value valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days regardless of other conditions.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS 3-month change and forward 20d SPX returns stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or returns following FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly higher than the unconditional mean (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a trailing 3-month window, it signals an inflection toward labor-market deterioration that historically precedes broader earnings downgrades, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day forward returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the average triggered return is not significantly below the unconditional 60-day mean (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in PAYEMS growth combined with a rising UNRATE indicates a joint labor-demand contraction that is more predictive of equity drawdowns than either series alone, because payroll softness confirms the unemployment signal is structural rather than noise, producing negative forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month annualized growth < 0.5% AND UNRATE up > 0.2pp over same window
failure_condition: Joint-trigger instances show forward 20d returns statistically indistinguishable from or greater than unconditional returns (p > 0.05) across at least two independent 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In periods of monetary tightening (FEDFUNDS above 3%), a decline in HOUST housing starts signals rate-sensitive demand destruction that leads broader economic activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter; the same HOUST decline in an easing regime is not predictive because it reflects normalization rather than distress.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls > 5% over trailing 3 months while FEDFUNDS > 3%
failure_condition: The direction of the HOUST-return relationship is indistinguishable between tightening and easing regimes (interaction coefficient not significant at p < 0.10), or forward 60d returns following triggers are not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained month-over-month increase in INDPRO reflects expanding industrial output and corporate revenue momentum, which is incorporated into equity prices with a short lag, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO monthly change and forward 5d SPX returns is below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds 4%, markets price in expectations of aggressive future FEDFUNDS hikes, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days until inflation decelerates below the threshold.
failure_condition: Forward 20d returns during high-inflation-trigger periods are not significantly negative relative to baseline (p > 0.05), or triggered instances show positive average returns in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A widening gap between FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL-implied inflation (real policy rate rising sharply) combined with decelerating CPIAUCSL signals restrictive real monetary conditions that suppress equity valuations over a full quarter, whereas either series alone is insufficient because nominal rate levels without inflation context misstate policy stance.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS minus CPIAUCSL YoY inflation rises > 1.5pp over 6 months
failure_condition: Forward 60d returns following real-rate-gap trigger are not significantly different from unconditional distribution (p > 0.05) across multiple rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month acceleration in RSAFS retail sales above 1% signals stronger-than-expected consumer demand that leads short-term earnings revisions upward, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 5d returns following RSAFS acceleration triggers are not significantly positive relative to baseline (p > 0.05), or hit rate falls below 50% over any 2-year rolling window.
